subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is located in Jodhpur?
question_hi: जोधपुर में कौन सा मंदिर है?
explanation_en:
Kala Burj is a famous fort located in Jodhpur.
In Hindi, it translates to 'Black Tower'. Mehrangarh Fort and Umaid Bhawan Palace are also famous forts in the region, but Kala Burj is the correct answer as it is specifically located in Jodhpur.
explanation_hi:
जोधपुर में बेंट एस्ट का नाम बेंट एस्ट है।
हिंदी में उसका अर्थ 'डॉक्टर' है। मेरान गैर और उमाई बेंट वाला हैं, लेकिन बेंट एस्ट को सिखाना चाहिए।
explanation_en:
Kala Burj is a popular landmark located in Jodhpur.
Mehrangarh Fort and Umaid Bhawan Palace are also notable places, but Kala Burj is specifically located in Jodhpur.
explanation_hi: जोधपुर में Kala Burj एस्ट को स्पष्ट करना चाहिए। मेरान गार्ज़न और उमाई बेंट वाले भूमिक गैराणी हैं, लेकिन Kala Burj एस्ट को स्पष्ट करना चाहिए।
explanation_en:
Kala Burj is a historical monument located in Jodhpur.
Other notable places like Mehrangarh Fort and Umaid Bhawan Palace also exist, but Kala Burj specifically belongs to Jodhpur.
explanation_hi: जोधपुर में मेरान गार्ज़न और उमाई बेंट वाले भूमिक गैराणी हैं, लेकिन Kala Burj को स्पष्ट करना चाहिए।
explanation_en:
Kala Burj is a historical monument in Jodhpur.
Other notable landmarks like Mehrangarh Fort and Umaid Bhawan Palace are also there, but Kala Burj is specifically located in Jodhpur.
explanation_hi: जोध्वापुर में मेरान गार्ज़न और उमाई बेंट वाले भूमिक गारना चाहिए।
explanation_en:
Kala Burj is a historical monument in Jodhpur.
Other famous landmarks like Mehrangarh Fort and Umaid Bhawan Palace are also present in Rajasthan, but Kala Burj is specifically located in Jodhpur.
explanation_hi: जोधिपुर में Kala Burj है, जोधिपुर में मेरान गारना है।
explanation_en:
Kala Burj is a historical monument in Jodhpur.
Other notable monuments like Mehrangarh Fort and Umaid Bhawan Palace are present in Rajasthan, but Kala Burj is specifically located in Jodhpur.
explanation_hi: जोधिपुर में केशिपुर में मेरान गारना है।
